prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 13868→11536→10024→16680，2022–2024 年持续前移（竞争加剧），但 2025 年出现大幅后移约 6656 名，基准位次约 16680 名；本省理科/物理类计划 2022 年 95 人、2023 年 98 人、2024 年 75 人、2025 年 82 人；2026 年计划 95 人，较 2025 年扩招约 15.9%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 50 名持续上升至 2025/2026 年第 43 名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度增强；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情；抖音热度总排名第 27 位（较热），2023 年分年排名第 6 位（高热），短视频曝光以"国防七子"、水声工程等特色专业为主，报考关注度较高；控制科学与工程为 A 等级（第五轮学科评估），船舶与海洋工程、水声工程、核工程等"三海一核"特色学科群实力突出，对理工类考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、自动化类、 电子信息类等工科专业社会热度持续偏高；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 53.5 万，按历史比例估算物理类约 32.9 万人，较 2025 年 28.5 万人增加约 15.5%，考生规模明显扩大，竞争加剧。；哈尔滨工程大学位于黑龙江，距四川较远，属于跨省异地求学。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移、2026 年扩招约 15.9%、本省物理类考生增加约 15.5%、学校排名持续上升及抖音热度较高等因素，扩招和考生增加形成对冲，预计 2026 年最低位次在 2025 年 16680 名基础上小幅后移后略有回调；预测最低位次约 18066 名，区间 17566–18566 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术（兴海领军班）
- 核工程与核技术（兴海领军班/钱学森班）
- 人工智能（兴海领军班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 自动化类（含自动化、机器人工程、电气工程等）
- 电子信息类（含水声工程、通信工程、光电等）
- 海洋工程类（含船舶与海洋工程、海洋机器人等）
- 航空航天类（含飞行器设计与工程、飞行器动力工程等）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 机械类（含机械设计制造及其自动化、工业设计）
- 应用物理学
- 新能源材料与器件
- 材料类（含材料科学与工程、化学工程与工艺）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 17566–18566 名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<17566 名）可重点冲刺一档兴海领军班及钱学森班等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>18566 名）建议以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中位次较低的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science/Physics Category was approximately 13868→11536→10024→16680. From 2022 to 2024, the ranking continued to move forward (increased competition), but in 2025, there was a significant backward shift of about 6656 places, with a baseline ranking of approximately 16680. The provincial Science/Physics Category enrollment plan was 95 in 2022, 98 in 2023, 75 in 2024, and 82 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 95, an increase of about 15.9% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the main ranking of Soft Science has steadily risen from 50th in 2021 to 43rd in 2025/2026, with a steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. In recent years, the reputation has been stable, with no obvious negative public opinion. The overall popularity ranking on Douyin is 27th (relatively hot), and the 2023 annual ranking is 6th (very hot). Short video exposure mainly features characteristic majors such as "National Defense Seven Sons" and Underwater Acoustic Engineering, attracting high attention for applications. Control Science and Engineering is rated A (fifth round of discipline evaluation), and the "Three Seas and One Nuclear" characteristic discipline cluster, including Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Underwater Acoustic Engineering, and Nuclear Engineering, has outstanding strength, strongly attracting science and engineering students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Automation, and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination students in the province in 2026 is about 535,000, with an estimated Physics Category of about 329,000 based on historical proportions, an increase of about 15.5% compared to 285,000 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. Harbin Engineering University is located in Heilongjiang, far from Sichuan, making it a cross-province study destination.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the enrollment expansion of about 15.9% in 2026, the increase of about 15.5% in provincial Physics Category candidates, the continuous rise in university rankings, and high Douyin popularity, the expansion and increase in candidates offset each other. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will slightly adjust backward from the 2025 ranking of 16680, with a slight rebound. The predicted minimum ranking is about 18066, with a range of 17566–18566.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science and Technology (Xinghai Leading Class)
- Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology (Xinghai Leading Class/Qian Xuesen Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (Xinghai Leading Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Automation (including Automation, Robotics Engineering, Electrical Engineering, etc.)
- Electronic Information (including Underwater Acoustic Engineering, Communication Engineering, Optoelectronics, etc.)
- Ocean Engineering (including Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Marine Robotics, etc.)
- Aerospace (including Aircraft Design and Engineering, Aircraft Power Engineering, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mechanical (including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Industrial Design)
- Applied Physics
- New Energy Materials and Devices
- Materials (including Materials Science and Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Technology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 17566–18566, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<17566), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as Xinghai Leading Class and Qian Xuesen Class. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>18566), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 majors with relatively lower rankings.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category approximately 5007→4603→6181→5735, with rankings moving forward in 2022–2023, significantly moving back by about 1578 places in 2024, and slightly adjusting forward by about 446 places in 2025, with a baseline ranking of about 5735; provincial liberal arts/history category plans: 7 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 24 in 2024, 23 in 2025; 2026 plan of 32, an increase of about 39.1% compared to 2025, a significant expansion that greatly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked 43rd on the Soft Science main list, with rankings continuously rising in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength; reputation stable in recent years, no significant negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranked 27th overall (relatively hot), but liberal arts majors have limited exposure; Control Science and Engineering A is the university's only A-class discipline, belonging to engineering; liberal arts enrollment majors (Business Administration, English, Ideological and Political Education, Sociology) have low correlation with the university's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of liberal arts majors is generally stable, with Business Administration category popularity diverging and awaiting observation; province estimates about 206,000 history category students in 2026 based on historical proportions, an increase of about 15.8% compared to 178,000 in 2025, expanding the candidate pool; Harbin Engineering University is located in Heilongjiang, far from Sichuan, requiring cross-province study.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the slight forward adjustment in 2025 rankings, a significant enrollment expansion of about 39.1% in 2026, and an increase of about 15.8% in history category candidates, the expansion rate significantly exceeds the candidate growth rate, so the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to move slightly forward (easier to enter) from the 2025 ranking of 5735; predicted minimum ranking approximately 7031, with a range of 6531–7531.
